name: academic-resource-hub
description: A multi-module academic resource sharing platform with Student, Faculty, and Admin portals.

scripts.dev: concurrently --names "BACKEND,FRONTEND,ADMIN" --prefix-colors "cyan,green,yellow" "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend" "npm run dev:admin"
scripts.build:all: npm run build:frontend && npm run build:admin
